name: Skydio
relevance: Vision-based GPS-denied quadcopter autonomy for public safety and inspection; aerial sim plus synthetic obstacle/scene data train the perception loop.

name: BRINC Drones
relevance: 911-response and indoor-capable public-safety drones; aerial sim plus synthetic indoor and breach scenes feed perception and policy training.
note: 911-response and public-safety drones plus drone-in-a-box stations

name: Quantum Systems
relevance: eVTOL fixed-wing ISR drones for NATO militaries and Ukraine; long-endurance flight sim plus synthetic terrain/target data are central to mission training.
note: eVTOL fixed-wing reconnaissance and surveillance drones

name: Tekever
relevance: Medium-endurance maritime ISR drones over the ocean; sea-state sim plus synthetic maritime-target imagery train detection at range.
note: autonomous maritime surveillance and ISR drones

name: Saildrone
relevance: Long-endurance uncrewed surface vessels for maritime domain awareness; ocean sim plus synthetic vessel/buoy imagery feed perception training.
note: wind- and solar-powered uncrewed surface vessels

name: HavocAI
relevance: Autonomous surface drone boats run in swarms for navies; multi-agent maritime sim plus synthetic coordination data feed the swarm autonomy stack.
note: autonomous surface vessel swarms for naval missions

name: Blue Water Autonomy
relevance: Full-size unmanned autonomous ocean-going ships; long-voyage sim plus synthetic maritime data are critical pre-deployment.

name: Gecko Robotics
relevance: Climbing, flying, and swimming inspection robots feeding the Cantilever AI platform; physics-tuned contact sim plus synthetic defect imagery accelerate field deployment.
note: wall-climbing, flying, and swimming infrastructure-inspection robots

name: ANYbotics
relevance: ANYmal quadruped patrols refineries and plants including explosive atmospheres; legged-locomotion sim plus synthetic industrial-scene data feed policy training.

name: Voliro
relevance: Tilt-rotor drones perform contact ultrasonic testing on infrastructure; aerial-contact sim plus synthetic defect/ultrasonic data are essential for the touch-the-asset behaviour.
note: tilt-rotor contact drones for non-destructive infrastructure testing

name: Aerones
relevance: Climbing robots inspect, clean, and repair turbine blades; tower-cell sim plus synthetic blade-defect imagery feed AI inspection.
note: wind-turbine climbing inspection, cleaning, and repair robots

name: Square Robot
relevance: Submersible robots inspect in-service fuel and chemical tanks while full; submerged sim plus synthetic tank-floor imagery train inspection during live operations.

name: Forterra
relevance: AutoDrive retrofit turns tactical and terminal vehicles uncrewed; off-road sim plus synthetic terrain/route data feed retrofit autonomy training.
note: retrofit autonomous driving system for military and industrial ground vehicles

name: Overland AI
relevance: DARPA-RACER-derived off-road autonomy plus ULTRA UGV; off-road sim plus synthetic terrain/obstacle data are central to contested-logistics missions.
note: off-road ground autonomy software and ULTRA UGV

name: ARX Robotics
relevance: Modular Gereon UGVs for logistics, casevac, and recon; off-road sim plus synthetic battlefield data feed the Mithra autonomy stack.
note: modular unmanned ground vehicles and battlefield autonomy software

name: Scout AI
relevance: Fury vision-language-action model for defense robots in comms- and GPS-denied environments; foundation-model sim plus synthetic multimodal data feed training directly.
note: vision-language-action foundation model for defense ground and aerial robots

name: Fortem Technologies
relevance: Net-gun counter-UAS interceptor paired with radar and command software; aerial-engagement sim plus synthetic intercept scenarios accelerate interceptor training.
note: autonomous counter-UAS interceptor drone with net guns

name: Asylon Robotics
relevance: Patrol drones and DroneDog Spot under one Guardian stack; mixed indoor/outdoor sim plus synthetic patrol scenes feed the autonomy.
note: robotic security-as-a-service with patrol drones and DroneDog quadruped
